nodes.label: CGC-PMS Project Overview
nodes.rationale: Construction general-contracting project management system with Spring Boot 3.3 backend (Java 21, MyBatis-Plus, Flyway, JWT, Redis, MinIO, MySQL/H2) and Vue 3 + TypeScript + Vite admin frontend.

nodes.label: Flyway Migration Policy
nodes.rationale: When changing schema, add new versioned migrations in both db/migration (MySQL) and db/migration-h2 (H2). Never edit already-applied Flyway migrations, as this causes checksum validation failures.

hyperedges.label: Dual Database Flyway Migration Pattern (MySQL + H2)
